forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Patchy fog on the western slopes in the late morning. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of fog near the Barossa Valley in the early morning. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to northwesterly and becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower west of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly in the early afternoon then tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 27.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 24.
